title: Unstable Sound Pack
description:
Lots of songs from unstable smp that you can play using /playsound command

Like do /playsound azali_ for the list of wemmbu songs

and do /playsound nombra_ for the list of flamefrags songs

on version 2.1 do /playsound dokuro_ for spokeishere list!
body:
![The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c6fd2e011c2e652038d690c9df3bc03280650a_0.webp)

> #  **Unstable Sound Pack**
> 
> **_Unstable Sound Pack_** is a resource packs with a lot of songs that have been used on unstable smp videos and you can play it with a simple command **/playsound**

> ### **Commands**
> 
> - do /playsound azali_ for the list of wemmbu songs
>   
> - and /playsound nombra_ for the list of flamefrags songs!
>   
> - you can also do /playsound dokuro_ for the list of spokeishere songs available on Version 2.1 -> latest versions
>   
> - and you can also do /playsoundd wemmbu or flamefrags for other lists of songs!

> ### **usefull**
> 
> **You might need this mod to play these songs in servers without op**: [clientplaysound ](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientplaysound)

> ### **How to use the mod?**
> 
> - do /ps "song name" to play the sound
>   
> - do /ss to stop the sound
>   
> - and some more commands are in the description of that mod

> # **New version changes - V4 and V4.fix**
> 
> - more lists - /playsound spokeishere_, /playsound other_, /playsound dokuro_...
>  
> - Added lots of new songs to these lists even non unstable portaganist songs
